text:
- First distill: due when `now - turn_started_at >= turn_first` (default 30s, `TENEX_EDGE_TURN_FIRST_S`).
   - After a successful distill this turn: due again only if `turn_repeat > 0` (default **0 = disabled**, `engine_lifecycle.rs:266-269`) and `now - last_distill_at >= turn_repeat`.
   - After a *failed* attempt: retried when `now - last_distill_attempt >= turn_first`.
   - **This is purely time-based** — no check of whether the transcript actually grew since the last distill.
4. Transcript is re-read fresh each time: `transcript::read_recent(path, 14, 2500)` (`transcript.rs:84-139`, tails last 96KB, last 14 user/assistant messages, capped 2500 chars) — `runtime.rs:352-358`.
5. Distill spawned as a background `tokio::spawn` with a 20s timeout (`runtime.rs:365-375`) calling `distill::distill_session(transcript, current_title, session_id)`.
